Task description specifies exactly 5 education options with codes E1-E5 (E1='Less than high school', E2='High school graduate', E3='Some college or Associate degree', E4='Bachelor's degree', E5='Graduate or professional degree'). export_result.sh verifies edu_options count >= 5.
Verified by LimeSurvey Manual (Question groups - introduction) and forum discussions. .lsg confirmed as standard format for exporting question groups. File can be imported into another survey.

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a reusable demographics survey module in LimeSurvey. Source survey 'Lab Master Template' contains group 'Standard Demographics' with three questions: DEMO_AGE (Numerical input, type N), DEMO_EDU (List/Radio type L with 5 education options E1-E5), and DEMO_EMP (Yes/No type Y). Group is exported as XML .lsg file to /home/ga/Documents/standard_demographics.lsg, then imported into target survey 'Social Interaction Study 2024'. All question type codes (N, L, Y) and file format (.lsg) verified against LimeSurvey documentation.
